title: cyperus iria
intro: Cyperus iria, also known as Tulsi or Holy Basil, is a sacred plant in Ayurvedic medicine and is commonly referred to as an herb. The medicinal properties of Cyperus iria include its adaptogenic and antioxidant properties, which help to balance the body's energy and protect it from oxidative stress. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system, making it an excellent addition to a daily wellness routine. Cyperus iria can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or oil, and is often consumed in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
